description_long: This bungalow features a sprawling, single-story layout with multiple interconnected structures, all finished in a warm red exterior with wooden roofs. The central highlight is a large rectangular swimming pool surrounded by a spacious wooden deck, complete with lounge chairs and shaded seating areas. Lush landscaping, including palm trees, shrubs, and manicured hedges, frames the property, providing privacy and a tropical ambiance. The bungalow includes several covered patios and open verandas, seamlessly blending indoor and outdoor living spaces. Large windows and sliding doors are visible, allowing for ample natural light and easy access to the pool and garden. The overall design is modern yet relaxed, ideal for a luxurious urban retreat.
description: A modern, single-story red bungalow with a large central pool, wooden decks, and lush tropical landscaping. Multiple covered patios and large windows create a seamless indoor-outdoor living experience.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, pool, wooden deck, and lush landscaping with palm trees and hedges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the interconnected structures, covered patios, and dense greenery surrounding the pool area.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the bungalow's multiple rooflines, extensive deck, and the pool's proximity to the living spaces.
description_view_3: Direct rear view focusing on the pool, sun loungers, and the symmetrical arrangement of the main building and side wings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
